sqlMap.select:
select count(org.id) from a_organization_t org where org.validflag > 0
ifnull((select count(aop.id) from a_organization_person_t aop where aop.orgid=org.id and aop.validflag>0 and aop.personnelid=#personnelid#),0)>0
org.orgName like '%$orgName$%'
org.orgType = '$orgType$'
org.orgClass = '$orgClass$'
org.controlUnit = $unitFilter$
org.controlPolice = $personFilter$
org.orgForeignName like '%$orgForeignName$%'
org.isRegister = '%$isRegister$%'
org.isForeignConnections = '%$isForeignConnections$%'
org.createTime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= org.createTime

select org.*,dt.departname AS unitname,ut.staffName AS policename from a_organization_t org LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON org.controlUnit = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON org.controlPolice = ut.id where org.validflag > 0
ifnull((select count(aop.id) from a_organization_person_t aop where aop.orgid=org.id and aop.validflag>0 and aop.personnelid=#personnelid#),0)>0
org.orgName like '%$orgName$%'
org.orgType = '$orgType$'
org.orgClass = '$orgClass$'
org.controlUnit = $unitFilter$
org.controlPolice = $personFilter$
org.orgForeignName like '%$orgForeignName$%'
org.isRegister = '%$isRegister$%'
org.isForeignConnections = '%$isForeignConnections$%'
org.createTime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= org.createTime
order by org.addtime desc
sqlMap.insert: insert into a_organization_t (orgName,orgType,orgClass,orgForeignName,inProvince,isRegister,createTime,createAddress, address,activeLevel,activeRange,activeWay,activeWayDetails,isForeignConnections, orgGeneral,proposition,finance,subsidize,controlTime,controlUnit,controlPolice, controlPhone,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo ) values ('$orgName$','$orgType$','$orgClass$','$orgForeignName$','$inProvince$','$isRegister$','$createTime$','$createAddress$', '$address$','$activeLevel$','$activeRange$','$activeWay$','$activeWayDetails$','$isForeignConnections$', '$orgGeneral$','$proposition$','$finance$','$subsidize$','$controlTime$','$controlUnit$','$controlPolice$', '$controlPhone$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$' ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: update a_organization_t set validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' where id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select org.*,dt.departname AS unitname,ut.staffName AS policename from a_organization_t org LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dt ON org.controlUnit = dt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user_t ut ON org.controlPolice = ut.id where org.validflag > 0 and org.id = $id$

select count(op.id) from a_organization_person_t op where op.validflag > 0
op.orgid = $orgid$
op.identity = '$identity$'
op.personName like '%$personName$%'
op.cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
op.telnumber = '$telnumber$'

select op.* from a_organization_person_t op where op.validflag > 0
op.orgid = $orgid$
op.identity = '$identity$'
op.personName like '%$personName$%'
op.cardnumber = '$cardnumber$'
op.telnumber = '$telnumber$'
order by op.addtime desc
sqlMap.insert: insert into a_organization_person_t (orgid,personnelid,identity,personName,cardnumber,homeplace,telnumber, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo ) values ('$orgid$','$personnelid$','$identity$','$personName$','$cardnumber$','$homeplace$','$telnumber$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$' ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: update a_organization_person_t set validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' where id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select op.* from a_organization_person_t op where op.validflag > 0 and op.id = $id$
select op.* from a_organization_person_t op where op.validflag > 0 and op.orgid = $orgid$

select count(op.id) from a_work_record_t op where op.validflag > 0
op.recordtype = '$recordtype$'
op.recordid = $recordid$
op.worktype = '$worktype$'
op.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
op.workrecord like '%$workrecord$%'

select op.* from a_work_record_t op where op.validflag > 0
op.recordtype = '$recordtype$'
op.recordid = $recordid$
op.worktype = '$worktype$'
op.workplace like '%$workplace$%'
op.workrecord like '%$workrecord$%'
order by op.worktime desc
sqlMap.insert: insert into a_work_record_t (recordtype,recordid,worktype,worktime,workplace,workrecord, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,fileattachments ) values ('$recordtype$',$recordid$,'$worktype$','$worktime$','$workplace$','$workrecord$', $validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$fileattachments$' ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: update a_work_record_t set validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' where id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT op.*, IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(ft.id ORDER BY ft.id DESC SEPARATOR ','), '') AS file_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(ft.fileName ORDER BY ft.id DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS filesname, GROUP_CONCAT(IFNULL(ft.addTime, '') ORDER BY ft.id DESC SEPARATOR ',') AS filesaddtime FROM a_work_record_t op LEFT JOIN sys_file_t ft ON FIND_IN_SET(ft.id, op.fileattachments) WHERE op.validflag > 0 AND op.id = $id$ GROUP BY op.id
